reviews.comment:
No cambio la atención en el shops hay una sola persona y no da a basto con los clientes ,para comprar hay que esperar mucho tiempo y el tiempo es oro

(Translated by Google)
I wouldn't change the service in the shops. There's only one person and he can't keep up with the customers. To buy, you have to wait a long time, and time is money.
